evidence_span: upload_service.py: save_upload() accepts report.pdf.jpg when filename.endswith('.jpg'), then writes UPLOAD_ROOT / filename. settings.toml: audit_log_retention_days is empty.

payload.issue: Missing magic byte validation on uploaded files
payload.evidence_span: upload_service.py: save_upload() accepts report.pdf.jpg when filename.endswith('.jpg'), then writes UPLOAD_ROOT / filename. settings.toml: audit_log_retention_days is empty.
payload.recommended_fix: Use magic bytes detection (e.g., python-magic) to validate the actual file type instead of relying solely on the file extension.

evidence_span: upload_service.py: save_upload() accepts report.pdf.jpg when filename.endswith('.jpg'), then writes UPLOAD_ROOT / filename. settings.toml: audit_log_retention_days is empty.

payload.evidence_span: upload_service.py: save_upload() accepts report.pdf.jpg when filename.endswith('.jpg'), then writes UPLOAD_ROOT / filename. settings.toml: audit_log_retention_days is empty.
payload.recommended_fix: Set a non-empty retention period in settings.toml, such as audit_log_retention_days = 90, to ensure audit logs are retained for a defined period.
